item.title: Victoria’s Secret billionaire to face congressional grilling over long Epstein friendship behind closed doors
item.description: Les Wexner, 88, the retired founder of L Brands, plans to cooperate with a subpoena from Democrats on the House Oversight and Government Reform Commit...

item.title: Exclusive: Bain and Greylock bet $42 million that AI agents can finally fix cybersecurity’s messiest bottleneck
item.description: Cogent Security boasts an all-star AI team—and is promising to close the gap between finding software flaws and actually fixing them.

item.title: Colbert’s CBS protest on YouTube viewed over 5 million times as he refuses to be silenced
item.description: Stephen Colbert isn't backing down in an extraordinary public dispute with his bosses at CBS over what he can air on his late-night talk show.

item.title: Zillow’s CTO says AI is reinventing every step of the home buying process
item.description: Zillow’s CTO David Beitel has led technology for the real estate website since its inception, with his north star focused on infusing technology acros...

item.title: Hyperliquid launches DeFi-focused policy shop led by prominent crypto lawyer Jake Chervinsky
item.description: The Hyperliquid Policy Center, backed by a $28 million donation, will focus on creating legal pathways for perpetual derivatives.
